violations.text: Bags of ice were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC relocated ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the back storage carts have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
Inspector observed cardboard, large droppings, and other debris around refuse area. PIC cleaned up area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The floors (back storage area and under retail shelves) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Outside trash compacter and dumpster area observed with litter, trash, and other debris. Outside trash and refuse area must cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
The wall in back storage area is in poor repair(observed a hole) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
